title: SFBEXOTIC Hardcore Modpack
description: SFBEXOTIC Hardcore Modpack is all the mods i use, resource packs, and etc. Including a world with my hardcore seed on it!
body:
This Modpack conatins all the mods i use and all the resource packs i use and the world seed i used in my videos for the hardcore series and uh i dont know what put here but enjoy, and i will update this modpack as i use more mods and resource packs, also the world in the modpack already has all the datapacks i use in my hardcore series!

Custom Totem Resource Pack Page From Curseforge: [Custom Totem](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/custom-totem)

Mob Heads Data Pack Page From Vanilla Tweaks: [Mob Heads Page](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/)

Watch My Entire Hardcore Season 1 Series From The Start: [Hardcore Season 1 Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLMcEQB9iFLxWUVSZ1biJOyR26fbaUg5uk)
